title: wb-character.create snapshot
description: Snapshot of the character create / generate panel: which generation pipeline is currently armed in the UI, the in-progress prompt, and the last generated asset URI.

armedPipeline.description: Which character:generate-* the player has open in the form; null when no form is active

draft.description: Free-form draft state of the form (prompt text, style chips, knobs); shape varies per pipeline
